description: Renovate is scoped to the Gradle/Android project ONLY. The Scala side is handled by scala-steward.yml, and the rest of the polyglot repo (npm, Docker, GitHub Actions) is intentionally left alone — so we whitelist just the two Gradle managers below. Widen enabledManagers if you ever want Renovate to own those too.

packageRules.description: The Kotlin Gradle plugin, the Compose compiler plugin and the kotlinx-serialization plugin are version-locked to the Kotlin release (the Compose plugin in particular MUST equal the Kotlin version). Bump them in one PR so they never drift apart.
androidx.lifecycle artifacts share a version (currently 2.8.6) and are meant to move together.
Haze 1.1.x is the Compose 1.7 line; 1.2+ requires Compose 1.8+, which this app isn't on yet (see the comment in app/build.gradle.kts). Cap auto-updates below 1.2 until Compose is upgraded.
